title: An Ordinance Amending in Addendum to Municipal Ordinance No. 2017-1638 Entitled ?an Ordinance Creating and Establishing the Barangay Employment and Livelihood Coordinating Unit (BELCU) in Fourteen 14 Barangays of Los Baños, Laguna Which Will Adopt and in Line with the Ten Point Agenda of President Rodrigo R. Duterte in Consonance to the Implementation of the Asean Reintegration Development Programs.? Providing for This Purpose, the Renaming of Belcu Into Barangay Employment Service Unit ( BESU)
